CustomField.description: Q1: I found a different solution that meets my needs
CustomField.inlineHelpText: What is better about the other solution?
CustomField.label: Survey - What is better in other sol.?

value.fullName: It is cheaper while still meeting my needs
value.label: It is cheaper while still meeting my needs

value.fullName: It has a particular feature I need
value.label: It has a particular feature I need

value.fullName: It has better data accuracy or quality
value.label: It has better data accuracy or quality
